message.content:
@startuml
participant "client application" as client #D3D8E9
participant kong #D3D8E9
participant "resource service" as resource #D3D8E9

== get token ==
->kong : Post (provision_key etc.)
<-kong  : return redirect url and token 

== get resource == 
 ->kong   :Post(sending Host and Token)  
 activate kong   
 <-kong    :verify token    
 deactivate kong     
 -->resource     :Proxy，load balance...      
 <--resource       
 <---client    

== refresh token ==        
-->kong      :send refresh token and other info         
<--kong       :return token and refreshtoken         


@enduml
